hero.label: Building Excellence
hero.subtitle: Over 20 years of experience in residential, commercial and industrial construction. Quality, safety and on-time delivery in every project.

about.label: Who we are
about.p1: Founded in 2004, Edifica was born with a clear purpose: to deliver construction projects that stand the test of time, with the technical excellence and human care that every client deserves.
about.p2: Our multidisciplinary team — engineers, architects and project managers — works in an integrated way so every project is executed safely, with quality and on schedule.

services.label: What we do
services.subtitle: From conception to delivery, we offer integrated services for every stage of your project.

items.title: Residential Construction
items.desc: Houses and apartments designed for your lifestyle, with high-durability materials and premium finishes.

items.title: Commercial Works
items.desc: Offices, shops and corporate buildings delivered efficiently and to the highest technical standards.

items.title: Industrial Projects
items.desc: Warehouses, logistics centers and industrial facilities focused on operational safety and practicality.

items.title: Renovation & Retrofit
items.desc: Revitalization of existing spaces, modernizing while preserving the original character of the building.

items.title: Project Management
items.desc: Full coordination of your project: schedule, budget, quality and compliance at every phase.

items.title: Technical Consulting
items.desc: Reports, inspections and technical assessments by certified engineers to support your decisions.

differentials.label: Why us
differentials.subtitle: Our methodology goes beyond technique. It is about commitment to people and results.
differentials.ctaSubtitle: Talk to our team and receive a personalized quote.

items.title: Total Safety
items.desc: All sites rigorously follow applicable safety standards and hold occupational safety certifications.

items.title: On-Time Delivery
items.desc: We meet deadlines. Our track record proves it: 97% of projects delivered on the agreed date.

items.title: Certified Quality
items.desc: ISO 9001 certified, ensuring processes and materials meet the highest standards.

items.title: Experienced Team
items.desc: Over 150 dedicated professionals — engineers, site managers and technical specialists.

items.title: Sustainability
items.desc: Sustainable building practices, waste reduction and conscious use of natural resources.

items.title: Transparency
items.desc: Regular reports, online access to project progress and monthly follow-up meetings.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Contact us and our commercial team will get back to you within 24 hours with a personalized quote for your project.

form.name: Full name
form.privacy: Your data is protected and will never be shared with third parties.
form.successDesc: We received your message. Our team will reach out within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Building excellence for over 20 years. Every project is treated with dedication and commitment to quality.

seo.homeTitle: Edifica Construction | Building Dreams with Excellence
seo.homeDesc: Edifica — 20 years of excellence in residential, commercial and industrial construction.
seo.aboutDesc: Learn about Edifica's story — 20 years building with excellence and certified quality.
seo.servicesDesc: Residential, commercial, industrial, renovation, project management and consulting.
seo.projectsDesc: Portfolio of projects delivered with excellence.
seo.contactDesc: Get in touch and request a free quote for your project.
